title: BookNest
description: A full-stack book management app built using the MERN stack with Google Books API integration.

title: Student Management System
description: A full-stack student management system using MERN stack to perform CRUD operations on student records. Implemented RESTful APIs and responsive UI for seamless user experience.

title: To-Do List Application
description: Built a dynamic to-do list web application using MERN stack, enabling users to create, update, and delete tasks with real-time UI updates and API integration.
